questions: Did the auto-merge resolve the conflict in src/tickets/index.ts without leaving markers?
Does the merged codebase compile without errors?
Are both ticket-side and staging-side intents preserved?

answers.answer: Yes, zero conflict markers remain in the conflicted file or any source file in the repository.

answers.answer: Yes, tsc completed with exit code 0 and zero errors (ran during npm install prepare script).

answers.answer: Yes, all 10 ticket subcommand imports (list, latest, get, create, rerun, continue, artifacts, artifact, bundle, update-description) are present at lines 4-13, and the library module is registered in src/index.ts at lines 14, 54-57, 98.

statement: Conflict resolution for helix-cli complete. Auto-merge resolved cleanly. Zero source changes needed. Build passed. All 10 ticket subcommands and library module registration preserved.
